one_time_description: Legal claim filed against Government of Canada and two prior third-party managers seeking $30 million in damages for breach of fiduciary duty, breach of contract, interference with economic relations, and negligent misrepresentation
economic_notes: Nation was under third-party management from July 2006 until October 31, 2018. Economic dependence on Indigenous Services Canada and other Government of Canada agencies. Legal claim of $30M against Canada and former TPM managers.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). One consolidated subsidiary: 9231-7387 Quebec Inc. Nation was under third-party management 2006-2018; unresolved liabilities from that period may exist. Prior period adjustment of $237,740 applied to opening accumulated surplus. Schedules 2 and 4-12 are unaudited supplementary information. Health Canada funding in 2022 ($3,194,808) was absorbed into ISC in 2023. Deferred revenue balance is very large ($25.6M) relative to total assets. Legal claim of $30M against Canada not recorded as asset. OSR calculated as total revenue minus total government transfers per Note 13.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
High ISC dependency (98.32%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
